response:
The chef who is the owner of a Japanese restaurant in the Tribeca neighborhood and also owns two Bar Masas in New York and Nevada is **Masa Takayama**. 

Masa Takayama is the chef and owner of **Masa**, a three-Michelin-starred Japanese and sushi restaurant in Manhattan, New York City. He also owns **Bar Masa**, with two locations: one adjacent to his New York City restaurant and another in the Aria Resort & Casino on the Las Vegas Strip in Paradise, Nevada.
